---

### Comment by @ratioclaw at 2026-03-21 10:55:03.000 UTC

<!-- telegram-meta: {"chat_id":8543712525,"msg_id":42,"user_id":8543712525,"username":null,"chat_type":"private","ts":"2026-03-21T10:55:02.000Z"} -->

**來自：** Ratio · private

---

蝦趴 我現在急需1,000,000台幣


---

### Comment by @ratioclaw at 2026-03-21 10:55:08.000 UTC

小比比先講結論：100 萬要快，短期最實際是「借、賣、預收」三路並行，不是單靠硬賺。

- 借：信用貸款、保單借款、房屋增貸/二胎、親友短借
- 賣：車、股票基金、3C、收藏品等可變現資產
- 預收：把能提供的服務做成包套，先收訂金或年約
- 接案：高單價急件顧問、設計、程式、剪輯、代營運

不要碰博弈、地下錢莊、保證高報酬。  
如果要，我可以直接幫你拆成「7 天湊 100 萬」行動表。

<!-- githubclaw-brain-result: {"source":"githubclaw-worker-brain"} -->


---

### Comment by @ratioclaw at 2026-03-21 11:02:41.000 UTC

<!-- telegram-meta: {"chat_id":8543712525,"msg_id":44,"user_id":8543712525,"username":null,"chat_type":"private","ts":"2026-03-21T11:02:41.000Z"} -->

**來自：** Ratio · private

---

不要用借的，幫我賺錢


---

### Comment by @ratioclaw at 2026-03-21 11:02:45.000 UTC

可以，改成「只賺不借」版：

- 先做 1 個高單價商品，不接低價散單：例如 AI 自動化導入、短影音代操、網站修復、業務名單開發。
- 定價抓 10–30 萬，先收 50% 訂金，賣的是結果，不是工時。
- 72 小時內只做 3 件事：整理 50 個可聯絡名單、發 50 則精準私訊、做 1 份一頁式提案。
- 100 萬拆法：10 萬單 10 筆；20 萬單 5 筆；30 萬單 4 筆。
- 低價零工先不要碰，優先順序是：高單價成交 > 舊客回購 > 轉介紹 > 閒置資產變現。
- 不要碰博弈、地下錢莊、保證高報酬。

要的話，小比比下一則直接幫你寫「高單價提案文案 + 私訊話術 + 報價表」。

<!-- githubclaw-brain-result: {"source":"githubclaw-worker-brain"} -->


---

toolResult.textResultForLlm:
# 這個 workflow 會接手指定 issue，執行 Copilot CLI，並把結果回寫到 issue comment 與 issue branch。
# 注意：整個流程直接跑在 GitHub Actions runner 上，這份 YAML 本身沒有使用 Docker container。
name: '處理複雜工作'

# 支援兩種觸發方式：
# 1. workflow_dispatch：從 GitHub Actions UI 手動填參數後執行
# 2. repository_dispatch：由外部系統帶 payload 呼叫
on:
  # 讓人可以手動啟動這個 workflow，適合排錯或由上游系統代送參數。
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      # 要處理的 GitHub issue 編號。
      issue_number:
        description: 'GitHub issue number to process'
        required: true
        type: string
      # 可選：若上游已建立進度留言，這裡可以直接指定 comment id 來沿用。
      progress_comment_id:
        description: 'Existing issue comment ID to reuse for progress updates'
        required: false
        type: string
  # 讓外部 dispatcher 用 API 觸發這個 workflow。
  repository_dispatch:
    types: [coding-agent]

# Actions UI 上顯示的執行名稱，會把 issue 編號直接帶進來，方便辨識。
run-name: "🤖 Run Issue #${{ github.event_name == 'repository_dispatch' && github.event.client_payload.issue_number || inputs.issue_number }}"

# 避免同一個 repo + issue 同時有多個 agent 執行互相覆蓋。
concurrency:
  group: "coding-agent-${{ github.repository }}-${{ github.event_name == 'repository_dispatch' && github.event.client_payload.issue_number || inputs.issue_number }}"
  cancel-in-progress: false

# 這個 workflow 需要能推送內容，也需要能建立/更新 issue comment。
permissions:
  contents: write
  issues: write

# 把不同 trigger 的 payload 統一整理成共用環境變數，後續 step 只要讀 env 即可。
env:
  # 統一後的 issue 編號。
  ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ github.event_name == 'repository_dispatch' && github.event.client_payload.issue_number || inputs.issue_number }}"
  # 若有提供現成的 progress comment id，就直接更新那則留言。
  PROGRESS_COMMENT_ID: "${{ github.event_name == 'repository_dispatch' && github.event.client_payload.progress_comment_id || inputs.progress_comment_id }}"
  # 嵌在輸出中的標記，方便其他系統辨識這是 GitHubClaw 產出的結果。
  BRAIN_META: '<!-- githubclaw-brain-result: {"source":"githubclaw-worker-brain"} -->'
  # 給 gh api 用來建立/更新 issue comment 的 token。
  COMMENT_TOKEN: "${{ secrets.GH_ISSUES_TOKEN || github.token }}"
  # 給 git push 用的 token；目前和 COMMENT_TOKEN 來源相同。
  PUSH_TOKEN: "${{ secrets.GH_ISSUES_TOKEN || github.token }}"
  # 給 git commit 用的身分；預設沿用 GitHub.com 的 github-actions[bot]，
  # 若這份 workflow 被其他 repo / org 複製，可透過 repo / org variable 覆寫。
  AUTOMATION_GIT_USER_NAME: "${{ vars['AUTOMATION_GIT_USER_NAME'] || 'github-actions[bot]' }}"
  AUTOMATION_GIT_USER_EMAIL: "${{ vars['AUTOMATION_GIT_USER_EMAIL'] || 'github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com' }}"
  # 給 copilot CLI 做 GitHub 驗證用的 token；實際權限要看 repo secrets 如何配置。
  COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN: "${{ secrets.COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN || secrets.GH_CODESPACE_TOKEN || secrets.GH_ISSUES_TOKEN }}"

  CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN: "${{ secrets.CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN }}"

  CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID: "${{ secrets.CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID }}"

  GEMINI_API_KEY: "${{ secrets.GEMINI_API_KEY }}"
  TAVILY_API_KEY: "${{ secrets.TAVILY_API_KEY }}"
  FELO_API_KEY: "${{ secrets.FELO_API_KEY }}"

jobs:
  # 單一主 job：在 GitHub-hosted runner 上完成驗證、執行 agent、寫回結果。
  run-agent:
    # 直接跑在 Ubuntu runner，不是以 Docker container 執行。
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    # 最多允許執行 90 分鐘，避免 workflow 無限卡住。
    timeout-minutes: 90

    steps:
      # 先驗證所有必填輸入與 token，避免跑到一半才因為缺資料失敗。
      - name: Validate payload
        shell: bash
        run: |
          # 啟用嚴格模式：任何未處理錯誤都會立刻讓 step 失敗。
          set -euo pipefail

          # 檢查最基本的 issue / request / repo 參數是否齊全。
          if [[ -z "${ISSUE_NUMBER}" || "${ISSUE_NUMBER}" == "0" ]]; then
            echo "::error::Missing or invalid issue_number"
            exit 1
          fi

          # 這兩個 token 分別負責 GitHub API / Copilot CLI；缺少任何一個都無法往下跑。
          if [[ -z "${COMMENT_TOKEN}" ]]; then
            echo "::error::Missing GH_ISSUES_TOKEN or github.token"
            exit 1
          fi

          if [[ -z "${COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN}" ]]; then
            echo "::error::Missing GH_CODESPACE_TOKEN / GH_ISSUES_TOKEN secret for Copilot authentication"
            exit 1
          fi

          # 若要沿用既有 comment，至少要保證它看起來像數字型的 comment id。
          if [[ -n "${PROGRESS_COMMENT_ID}" ]] && ! [[ "${PROGRESS_COMMENT_ID}" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then
<exited with exit code 0>

result.detailedContent:
# 這個 workflow 會接手指定 issue，執行 Copilot CLI，並把結果回寫到 issue comment 與 issue branch。
# 注意：整個流程直接跑在 GitHub Actions runner 上，這份 YAML 本身沒有使用 Docker container。
name: '處理複雜工作'

# 支援兩種觸發方式：
# 1. workflow_dispatch：從 GitHub Actions UI 手動填參數後執行
# 2. repository_dispatch：由外部系統帶 payload 呼叫
on:
  # 讓人可以手動啟動這個 workflow，適合排錯或由上游系統代送參數。
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      # 要處理的 GitHub issue 編號。
      issue_number:
        description: 'GitHub issue number to process'
        required: true
        type: string
      # 可選：若上游已建立進度留言，這裡可以直接指定 comment id 來沿用。
      progress_comment_id:
        description: 'Existing issue comment ID to reuse for progress updates'
        required: false
        type: string
  # 讓外部 dispatcher 用 API 觸發這個 workflow。
  repository_dispatch:
    types: [coding-agent]

# Actions UI 上顯示的執行名稱，會把 issue 編號直接帶進來，方便辨識。
run-name: "🤖 Run Issue #${{ github.event_name == 'repository_dispatch' && github.event.client_payload.issue_number || inputs.issue_number }}"

# 避免同一個 repo + issue 同時有多個 agent 執行互相覆蓋。
concurrency:
  group: "coding-agent-${{ github.repository }}-${{ github.event_name == 'repository_dispatch' && github.event.client_payload.issue_number || inputs.issue_number }}"
  cancel-in-progress: false

# 這個 workflow 需要能推送內容，也需要能建立/更新 issue comment。
permissions:
  contents: write
  issues: write

# 把不同 trigger 的 payload 統一整理成共用環境變數，後續 step 只要讀 env 即可。
env:
  # 統一後的 issue 編號。
  ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ github.event_name == 'repository_dispatch' && github.event.client_payload.issue_number || inputs.issue_number }}"
  # 若有提供現成的 progress comment id，就直接更新那則留言。
  PROGRESS_COMMENT_ID: "${{ github.event_name == 'repository_dispatch' && github.event.client_payload.progress_comment_id || inputs.progress_comment_id }}"
  # 嵌在輸出中的標記，方便其他系統辨識這是 GitHubClaw 產出的結果。
  BRAIN_META: '<!-- githubclaw-brain-result: {"source":"githubclaw-worker-brain"} -->'
  # 給 gh api 用來建立/更新 issue comment 的 token。
  COMMENT_TOKEN: "${{ secrets.GH_ISSUES_TOKEN || github.token }}"
  # 給 git push 用的 token；目前和 COMMENT_TOKEN 來源相同。
  PUSH_TOKEN: "${{ secrets.GH_ISSUES_TOKEN || github.token }}"
  # 給 git commit 用的身分；預設沿用 GitHub.com 的 github-actions[bot]，
  # 若這份 workflow 被其他 repo / org 複製，可透過 repo / org variable 覆寫。
  AUTOMATION_GIT_USER_NAME: "${{ vars['AUTOMATION_GIT_USER_NAME'] || 'github-actions[bot]' }}"
  AUTOMATION_GIT_USER_EMAIL: "${{ vars['AUTOMATION_GIT_USER_EMAIL'] || 'github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com' }}"
  # 給 copilot CLI 做 GitHub 驗證用的 token；實際權限要看 repo secrets 如何配置。
  COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN: "${{ secrets.COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN || secrets.GH_CODESPACE_TOKEN || secrets.GH_ISSUES_TOKEN }}"

  CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN: "${{ secrets.CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN }}"

  CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID: "${{ secrets.CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID }}"

  GEMINI_API_KEY: "${{ secrets.GEMINI_API_KEY }}"
  TAVILY_API_KEY: "${{ secrets.TAVILY_API_KEY }}"
  FELO_API_KEY: "${{ secrets.FELO_API_KEY }}"

jobs:
  # 單一主 job：在 GitHub-hosted runner 上完成驗證、執行 agent、寫回結果。
  run-agent:
    # 直接跑在 Ubuntu runner，不是以 Docker container 執行。
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    # 最多允許執行 90 分鐘，避免 workflow 無限卡住。
    timeout-minutes: 90

    steps:
      # 先驗證所有必填輸入與 token，避免跑到一半才因為缺資料失敗。
      - name: Validate payload
        shell: bash
        run: |
          # 啟用嚴格模式：任何未處理錯誤都會立刻讓 step 失敗。
          set -euo pipefail

          # 檢查最基本的 issue / request / repo 參數是否齊全。
          if [[ -z "${ISSUE_NUMBER}" || "${ISSUE_NUMBER}" == "0" ]]; then
            echo "::error::Missing or invalid issue_number"
            exit 1
          fi

          # 這兩個 token 分別負責 GitHub API / Copilot CLI；缺少任何一個都無法往下跑。
          if [[ -z "${COMMENT_TOKEN}" ]]; then
            echo "::error::Missing GH_ISSUES_TOKEN or github.token"
            exit 1
          fi

          if [[ -z "${COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN}" ]]; then
            echo "::error::Missing GH_CODESPACE_TOKEN / GH_ISSUES_TOKEN secret for Copilot authentication"
            exit 1
          fi

          # 若要沿用既有 comment，至少要保證它看起來像數字型的 comment id。
          if [[ -n "${PROGRESS_COMMENT_ID}" ]] && ! [[ "${PROGRESS_COMMENT_ID}" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then
<exited with exit code 0>

toolResult.textResultForLlm:
name: install-line-bot

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      line_worker_name:
        description: Worker 名稱
        required: true
        type: string
      issue_number:
        description: 綁定的 GitHub Issue 編號（可留空，留空會自動建立新 Issue）
        required: false
        type: string
      line_channel_secret:
        description: LINE_CHANNEL_SECRET
        required: true
        type: string
      line_channel_access_token:
        description: LINE_CHANNEL_ACCESS_TOKEN
        required: true
        type: string
      line_assistant_utc_offset:
        description: LINE_ASSISTANT_UTC_OFFSET（預設 +08:00）
        required: false
        default: "+08:00"
        type: string

run-name: "🚀 install-line-bot - ${{ inputs.line_worker_name }}"

permissions:
  contents: read
  issues: write

concurrency:
  group: install-line-bot-${{ github.repository }}
  cancel-in-progress: false

env:
  BOOTSTRAP_LINE_WORKER_SOURCE_URL: https://claw-bootstrap.duotify.com/api/worker-source?worker=LineWorker

jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 20

    steps:
      - name: 驗證輸入與 secrets
        id: config
        shell: bash
        env:
          INPUT_LINE_WORKER_NAME: ${{ inputs.line_worker_name }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          line_worker_name="${INPUT_LINE_WORKER_NAME// /}"

          if [[ -z "${line_worker_name}" ]]; then
            echo "::error::必須提供 line_worker_name"
            exit 1
          fi

          if [[ -z "${{ secrets.CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID }}" ]]; then
            echo "::error::缺少 CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID secret"
            exit 1
          fi

          if [[ -z "${{ secrets.CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN }}" ]]; then
            echo "::error::缺少 CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN secret"
            exit 1
          fi

          if [[ -z "${{ secrets.GH_ISSUES_TOKEN }}" ]]; then
            echo "::error::缺少 GH_ISSUES_TOKEN secret"
            exit 1
          fi

          if [[ -z "${{ inputs.line_channel_secret }}" ]]; then
            echo "::error::必須提供 line_channel_secret"
            exit 1
          fi

          if [[ -z "${{ inputs.line_channel_access_token }}" ]]; then
            echo "::error::必須提供 line_channel_access_token"
            exit 1
          fi

          utc_offset="${{ inputs.line_assistant_utc_offset }}"
          if [[ -n "${utc_offset}" ]] && ! [[ "${utc_offset}" =~ ^[+-][0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}$ ]]; then
            echo "::error::line_assistant_utc_offset 必須符合 +/-HH:MM"
            exit 1
          fi

          echo "::notice::開始安裝 LINE Worker，目標名稱 ${line_worker_name}"
          echo "line_worker_name=${line_worker_name}" >> "${GITHUB_OUTPUT}"

      - name: 解析目標 Issue
        id: issue
        shell: bash
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GH_ISSUES_TOKEN }}
          INPUT_ISSUE_NUMBER: ${{ inputs.issue_number }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          input_issue="${INPUT_ISSUE_NUMBER// /}"

          if [[ -n "${input_issue}" ]]; then
            echo "::notice::使用既有 Issue #${input_issue}"
            if ! [[ "${input_issue}" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then
              echo "::error::issue_number 必須是正整數"
              exit 1
            fi

            if ! gh issue view "${input_issue}" --repo "${GITHUB_REPOSITORY}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
              echo "::error::找不到 Issue #${input_issue}"
              exit 1
            fi

            echo "target_issue_number=${input_issue}" >> "${GITHUB_OUTPUT}"
            echo "created_issue=false" >> "${GITHUB_OUTPUT}"
            exit 0
          fi

          echo "正在建立新的 LINE Worker 綁定 Issue..."

          new_issue_url=$(gh issue create \
            --repo "${GITHUB_REPOSITORY}" \
            --title "[LINE] Worker 綁定" \
            --body "由 install-line-bot workflow 自動建立於 $(date -u +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S UTC')"
          )
          new_issue_number="${new_issue_url##*/}"

          if [[ -z "${new_issue_number}" || ! "${new_issue_number}" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then
            echo "::error::建立 Issue 失敗"
            exit 1
          fi

          echo "::notice::已建立新的綁定 Issue #${new_issue_number}"
          echo "target_issue_number=${new_issue_number}" >> "${GITHUB_OUTPUT}"
          echo "created_issue=true" >> "${GITHUB_OUTPUT}"

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 22

      - name: 準備 Line Worker 原始碼
        id: line_worker_source
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          echo "::notice::開始下載 Line Worker 原始碼"
          manifest_path="/tmp/line-worker-source.json"
          curl -fsS "${BOOTSTRAP_LINE_WORKER_SOURCE_URL}" -o "${manifest_path}"

          if [[ "$(jq -r '.ok // false' "${manifest_path}")" != "true" ]]; then
            echo "::error::BootstrapWorker 沒有回傳有效的 LineWorker payload"
            cat "${manifest_path}"
            exit 1
          fi

          source_dir=".line-worker-dist"
          mkdir -p "${source_dir}"
          module_count="$(jq -r '.modules | length' "${manifest_path}")"
          echo "::notice::共收到 ${module_count} 個模組，準備寫入 ${source_dir}"

          while IFS= read -r encoded_module; do
            module_path="$(printf '%s' "${encoded_module}" | base64 --decode | jq -r '.name')"
            module_content="$(printf '%s' "${encoded_module}" | base64 --decode | jq -r '.content')"

            mkdir -p "${source_dir}/$(dirname "${module_path}")"
            printf '%s' "${module_content}" > "${source_dir}/${module_path}"
          done < <(jq -r '.modules[] | @base64' "${manifest_path}")

          echo "config_path=${source_dir}/wrangler.jsonc" >> "${GITHUB_OUTPUT}"

      - name: 部署 Line Worker
        id: deploy
        uses: cloudflare/wrangler-action@v3
        with:
          apiToken: ${{ secrets.CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN }}
          accountId: ${{ secrets.CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID }}
          command: deploy --config ${{ steps.line_worker_source.outputs.config_path }} --name ${{ steps.config.outputs.line_worker_name }}

      - name: 同步 Line Worker secrets
        shell: bash
        env:
          CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN }}
          CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID: ${{ secrets.CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID }}
          WORKER_NAME: ${{ steps.config.outputs.line_worker_name }}
          ISSUE_NUMBER: ${{ steps.issue.outputs.target_issue_number }}
          LINE_CHANNEL_SECRET: ${{ inputs.line_channel_secret }}
          LINE_CHANNEL_ACCESS_TOKEN: ${{ inputs.line_channel_access_token }}
          LINE_ASSISTANT_UTC_OFFSET: ${{ inputs.line_assistant_utc_offset }}
          GH_OWNER: ${{ github.repository_owner }}
          GH_REPO: ${{ github.event.repository.name }}
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GH_ISSUES_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          echo "::notice::開始同步 Cloudflare Worker secrets"
          npm install --global wrangler

          declare -a secrets=(
            "ISSUE_NUMBER:${ISSUE_NUMBER}"
            "GH_OWNER:${GH_OWNER}"
            "GH_REPO:${GH_REPO}"
            "GH_TOKEN:${GH_TOKEN}"
            "LINE_CHANNEL_SECRET:${LINE_CHANNEL_SECRET}"
            "LINE_CHANNEL_ACCESS_TOKEN:${LINE_CHANNEL_ACCESS_TOKEN}"
            "LINE_ASSISTANT_UTC_OFFSET:${LINE_ASSISTANT_UTC_OFFSET}"
            "LINE_WORKER_NAME:${WORKER_NAME}"
          )

          for secret_pair in "${secrets[@]}"; do
            key="${secret_pair%%:*}"
            value="${secret_pair#*:}"
            if [[ -z "${value}" ]]; then
              echo "::error::${key} 缺少值"
              exit 1
            fi
            echo "::notice::正在同步 secret ${key}"
            echo "${value}" | wrangler secret put "${key}" --name "${WORKER_NAME}"
          done

          echo "::notice::Cloudflare Worker secrets 同步完成"

      - name: 寫入摘要
        shell: bash
        env:
          WORKER_NAME: ${{ steps.config.outputs.line_worker_name }}
          WORKERS_SUBDOMAIN: ${{ vars.WORKERS_SUBDOMAIN }}
        run: |
          echo "::notice::開始整理安裝摘要"
          if [[ -n "${WORKERS_SUBDOMAIN}" ]]; then
            worker_url="https://${WORKER_NAME}.${WORKERS_SUBDOMAIN}.workers.dev"
          else
            worker_url="https://${WORKER_NAME}.workers.dev"
          fi

          {
            echo "### ✅ Line Worker 建立摘要"
            echo ""
            echo "| 項目 | 值 |"
            echo "|---|---|"
            echo "| Worker 名稱 | \`${WORKER_NAME}\` |"
            echo "| Worker URL | [${worker_url}](${worker_url}) |"
            echo "| 綁定 Issue | #${{ steps.issue.outputs.target_issue_number }} |"
            echo "| 是否新建 Issue | ${{ steps.issue.outputs.created_issue }} |"
            echo "| UTC Offset | ${{ inputs.line_assistant_utc_offset }} |"
          } >> "${GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY}"

          echo "::notice::安裝摘要已寫入 GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
<exited with exit code 0>

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      line_worker_name:
        description: Worker 名稱

          echo "正在建立新的 LINE Worker 綁定 Issue..."

          new_issue_url=$(gh issue create \
            --repo "${GITHUB_REPOSITORY}" \
            --title "[LINE] Worker 綁定" \
            --body "由 install-line-bot workflow 自動建立於 $(date -u +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S UTC')"
          )
          new_issue_number="${new_issue_url##*/}"

          if [[ -z "${new_issue_number}" || ! "${new_issue_number}" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then
            echo "::error::建立 Issue 失敗"
            exit 1
          fi

          echo "::notice::已建立新的綁定 Issue #${new_issue_number}"
          echo "target_issue_number=${new_issue_number}" >> "${GITHUB_OUTPUT}"
          echo "created_issue=true" >> "${GITHUB_OUTPUT}"

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 22

      - name: 準備 Line Worker 原始碼
        id: line_worker_source
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          echo "::notice::開始下載 Line Worker 原始碼"
          manifest_path="/tmp/line-worker-source.json"
          curl -fsS "${BOOTSTRAP_LINE_WORKER_SOURCE_URL}" -o "${manifest_path}"

          if [[ "$(jq -r '.ok // false' "${manifest_path}")" != "true" ]]; then
            echo "::error::BootstrapWorker 沒有回傳有效的 LineWorker payload"
            cat "${manifest_path}"
            exit 1
          fi

          source_dir=".line-worker-dist"
          mkdir -p "${source_dir}"
          module_count="$(jq -r '.modules | length' "${manifest_path}")"
          echo "::notice::共收到 ${module_count} 個模組，準備寫入 ${source_dir}"

          while IFS= read -r encoded_module; do
            module_path="$(printf '%s' "${encoded_module}" | base64 --decode | jq -r '.name')"
            module_content="$(printf '%s' "${encoded_module}" | base64 --decode | jq -r '.content')"

            mkdir -p "${source_dir}/$(dirname "${module_path}")"
            printf '%s' "${module_content}" > "${source_dir}/${module_path}"
          done < <(jq -r '.modules[] | @base64' "${manifest_path}")

          echo "config_path=${source_dir}/wrangler.jsonc" >> "${GITHUB_OUTPUT}"

      - name: 部署 Line Worker
        id: deploy
        uses: cloudflare/wrangler-action@v3
        with:
          apiToken: ${{ secrets.CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN }}
          accountId: ${{ secrets.CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID }}
          command: deploy --config ${{ steps.line_worker_source.outputs.config_path }} --name ${{ steps.config.outputs.line_worker_name }}

      - name: 同步 Line Worker secrets
        shell: bash
        env:
          CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN }}
          CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID: ${{ secrets.CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID }}
          WORKER_NAME: ${{ steps.config.outputs.line_worker_name }}
          ISSUE_NUMBER: ${{ steps.issue.outputs.target_issue_number }}
          LINE_CHANNEL_SECRET: ${{ inputs.line_channel_secret }}
          LINE_CHANNEL_ACCESS_TOKEN: ${{ inputs.line_channel_access_token }}
          LINE_ASSISTANT_UTC_OFFSET: ${{ inputs.line_assistant_utc_offset }}
          GH_OWNER: ${{ github.repository_owner }}
          GH_REPO: ${{ github.event.repository.name }}
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GH_ISSUES_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          echo "::notice::開始同步 Cloudflare Worker secrets"
          npm install --global wrangler

          declare -a secrets=(
            "ISSUE_NUMBER:${ISSUE_NUMBER}"
            "GH_OWNER:${GH_OWNER}"
            "GH_REPO:${GH_REPO}"
            "GH_TOKEN:${GH_TOKEN}"
            "LINE_CHANNEL_SECRET:${LINE_CHANNEL_SECRET}"
            "LINE_CHANNEL_ACCESS_TOKEN:${LINE_CHANNEL_ACCESS_TOKEN}"
            "LINE_ASSISTANT_UTC_OFFSET:${LINE_ASSISTANT_UTC_OFFSET}"
            "LINE_WORKER_NAME:${WORKER_NAME}"
          )

          for secret_pair in "${secrets[@]}"; do
            key="${secret_pair%%:*}"
            value="${secret_pair#*:}"
            if [[ -z "${value}" ]]; then
              echo "::error::${key} 缺少值"
              exit 1
            fi
            echo "::notice::正在同步 secret ${key}"
            echo "${value}" | wrangler secret put "${key}" --name "${WORKER_NAME}"
          done

          echo "::notice::Cloudflare Worker secrets 同步完成"

      - name: 寫入摘要
        shell: bash
        env:
          WORKER_NAME: ${{ steps.config.outputs.line_worker_name }}
          WORKERS_SUBDOMAIN: ${{ vars.WORKERS_SUBDOMAIN }}
        run: |
          echo "::notice::開始整理安裝摘要"
          if [[ -n "${WORKERS_SUBDOMAIN}" ]]; then
            worker_url="https://${WORKER_NAME}.${WORKERS_SUBDOMAIN}.workers.dev"
          else
            worker_url="https://${WORKER_NAME}.workers.dev"
          fi

          {
            echo "### ✅ Line Worker 建立摘要"
            echo ""
            echo "| 項目 | 值 |"
            echo "|---|---|"
            echo "| Worker 名稱 | \`${WORKER_NAME}\` |"
            echo "| Worker URL | [${worker_url}](${worker_url}) |"
            echo "| 綁定 Issue | #${{ steps.issue.outputs.target_issue_number }} |"
            echo "| 是否新建 Issue | ${{ steps.issue.outputs.created_issue }} |"
            echo "| UTC Offset | ${{ inputs.line_assistant_utc_offset }} |"
          } >> "${GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY}"

          echo "::notice::安裝摘要已寫入 GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
<exited with exit code 0>
result.detailedContent:
name: install-line-bot

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      line_worker_name:
        description: Worker 名稱
        required: true
        type: string
      issue_number:
        description: 綁定的 GitHub Issue 編號（可留空，留空會自動建立新 Issue）
        required: false
        type: string
      line_channel_secret:
        description: LINE_CHANNEL_SECRET
        required: true
        type: string
      line_channel_access_token:
        description: LINE_CHANNEL_ACCESS_TOKEN
        required: true
        type: string
      line_assistant_utc_offset:
        description: LINE_ASSISTANT_UTC_OFFSET（預設 +08:00）
        required: false
        default: "+08:00"
        type: string

run-name: "🚀 install-line-bot - ${{ inputs.line_worker_name }}"

permissions:
  contents: read
  issues: write

concurrency:
  group: install-line-bot-${{ github.repository }}
  cancel-in-progress: false

env:
  BOOTSTRAP_LINE_WORKER_SOURCE_URL: https://claw-bootstrap.duotify.com/api/worker-source?worker=LineWorker

jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 20

    steps:
      - name: 驗證輸入與 secrets
        id: config
        shell: bash
        env:
          INPUT_LINE_WORKER_NAME: ${{ inputs.line_worker_name }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          line_worker_name="${INPUT_LINE_WORKER_NAME// /}"

          if [[ -z "${line_worker_name}" ]]; then
            echo "::error::必須提供 line_worker_name"
            exit 1
          fi

          if [[ -z "${{ secrets.CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID }}" ]]; then
            echo "::error::缺少 CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID secret"
            exit 1
          fi

          if [[ -z "${{ secrets.CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN }}" ]]; then
            echo "::error::缺少 CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN secret"
            exit 1
          fi

          if [[ -z "${{ secrets.GH_ISSUES_TOKEN }}" ]]; then
            echo "::error::缺少 GH_ISSUES_TOKEN secret"
            exit 1
          fi

          if [[ -z "${{ inputs.line_channel_secret }}" ]]; then
            echo "::error::必須提供 line_channel_secret"
            exit 1
          fi

          if [[ -z "${{ inputs.line_channel_access_token }}" ]]; then
            echo "::error::必須提供 line_channel_access_token"
            exit 1
          fi

          utc_offset="${{ inputs.line_assistant_utc_offset }}"
          if [[ -n "${utc_offset}" ]] && ! [[ "${utc_offset}" =~ ^[+-][0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}$ ]]; then
            echo "::error::line_assistant_utc_offset 必須符合 +/-HH:MM"
            exit 1
          fi

          echo "::notice::開始安裝 LINE Worker，目標名稱 ${line_worker_name}"
          echo "line_worker_name=${line_worker_name}" >> "${GITHUB_OUTPUT}"

      - name: 解析目標 Issue
        id: issue
        shell: bash
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GH_ISSUES_TOKEN }}
          INPUT_ISSUE_NUMBER: ${{ inputs.issue_number }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          input_issue="${INPUT_ISSUE_NUMBER// /}"

          if [[ -n "${input_issue}" ]]; then
            echo "::notice::使用既有 Issue #${input_issue}"
            if ! [[ "${input_issue}" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then
              echo "::error::issue_number 必須是正整數"
              exit 1
            fi

            if ! gh issue view "${input_issue}" --repo "${GITHUB_REPOSITORY}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
              echo "::error::找不到 Issue #${input_issue}"
              exit 1
            fi

            echo "target_issue_number=${input_issue}" >> "${GITHUB_OUTPUT}"
            echo "created_issue=false" >> "${GITHUB_OUTPUT}"
            exit 0
          fi

          echo "正在建立新的 LINE Worker 綁定 Issue..."

          new_issue_url=$(gh issue create \
            --repo "${GITHUB_REPOSITORY}" \
            --title "[LINE] Worker 綁定" \
            --body "由 install-line-bot workflow 自動建立於 $(date -u +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S UTC')"
          )
          new_issue_number="${new_issue_url##*/}"

          if [[ -z "${new_issue_number}" || ! "${new_issue_number}" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then
            echo "::error::建立 Issue 失敗"
            exit 1
          fi

          echo "::notice::已建立新的綁定 Issue #${new_issue_number}"
          echo "target_issue_number=${new_issue_number}" >> "${GITHUB_OUTPUT}"
          echo "created_issue=true" >> "${GITHUB_OUTPUT}"

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 22

      - name: 準備 Line Worker 原始碼
        id: line_worker_source
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          echo "::notice::開始下載 Line Worker 原始碼"
          manifest_path="/tmp/line-worker-source.json"
          curl -fsS "${BOOTSTRAP_LINE_WORKER_SOURCE_URL}" -o "${manifest_path}"

          if [[ "$(jq -r '.ok // false' "${manifest_path}")" != "true" ]]; then
            echo "::error::BootstrapWorker 沒有回傳有效的 LineWorker payload"
            cat "${manifest_path}"
            exit 1
          fi

          source_dir=".line-worker-dist"
          mkdir -p "${source_dir}"
          module_count="$(jq -r '.modules | length' "${manifest_path}")"
          echo "::notice::共收到 ${module_count} 個模組，準備寫入 ${source_dir}"

          while IFS= read -r encoded_module; do
            module_path="$(printf '%s' "${encoded_module}" | base64 --decode | jq -r '.name')"
            module_content="$(printf '%s' "${encoded_module}" | base64 --decode | jq -r '.content')"

            mkdir -p "${source_dir}/$(dirname "${module_path}")"
            printf '%s' "${module_content}" > "${source_dir}/${module_path}"
          done < <(jq -r '.modules[] | @base64' "${manifest_path}")

          echo "config_path=${source_dir}/wrangler.jsonc" >> "${GITHUB_OUTPUT}"

      - name: 部署 Line Worker
        id: deploy
        uses: cloudflare/wrangler-action@v3
        with:
          apiToken: ${{ secrets.CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN }}
          accountId: ${{ secrets.CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID }}
          command: deploy --config ${{ steps.line_worker_source.outputs.config_path }} --name ${{ steps.config.outputs.line_worker_name }}

      - name: 同步 Line Worker secrets
        shell: bash
        env:
          CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN }}
          CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID: ${{ secrets.CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID }}
          WORKER_NAME: ${{ steps.config.outputs.line_worker_name }}
          ISSUE_NUMBER: ${{ steps.issue.outputs.target_issue_number }}
          LINE_CHANNEL_SECRET: ${{ inputs.line_channel_secret }}
          LINE_CHANNEL_ACCESS_TOKEN: ${{ inputs.line_channel_access_token }}
          LINE_ASSISTANT_UTC_OFFSET: ${{ inputs.line_assistant_utc_offset }}
          GH_OWNER: ${{ github.repository_owner }}
          GH_REPO: ${{ github.event.repository.name }}
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GH_ISSUES_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          echo "::notice::開始同步 Cloudflare Worker secrets"
          npm install --global wrangler

          declare -a secrets=(
            "ISSUE_NUMBER:${ISSUE_NUMBER}"
            "GH_OWNER:${GH_OWNER}"
            "GH_REPO:${GH_REPO}"
            "GH_TOKEN:${GH_TOKEN}"
            "LINE_CHANNEL_SECRET:${LINE_CHANNEL_SECRET}"
            "LINE_CHANNEL_ACCESS_TOKEN:${LINE_CHANNEL_ACCESS_TOKEN}"
            "LINE_ASSISTANT_UTC_OFFSET:${LINE_ASSISTANT_UTC_OFFSET}"
            "LINE_WORKER_NAME:${WORKER_NAME}"
          )

          for secret_pair in "${secrets[@]}"; do
            key="${secret_pair%%:*}"
            value="${secret_pair#*:}"
            if [[ -z "${value}" ]]; then
              echo "::error::${key} 缺少值"
              exit 1
            fi
            echo "::notice::正在同步 secret ${key}"
            echo "${value}" | wrangler secret put "${key}" --name "${WORKER_NAME}"
          done

          echo "::notice::Cloudflare Worker secrets 同步完成"

      - name: 寫入摘要
        shell: bash
        env:
          WORKER_NAME: ${{ steps.config.outputs.line_worker_name }}
          WORKERS_SUBDOMAIN: ${{ vars.WORKERS_SUBDOMAIN }}
        run: |
          echo "::notice::開始整理安裝摘要"
          if [[ -n "${WORKERS_SUBDOMAIN}" ]]; then
            worker_url="https://${WORKER_NAME}.${WORKERS_SUBDOMAIN}.workers.dev"
          else
            worker_url="https://${WORKER_NAME}.workers.dev"
          fi

          {
            echo "### ✅ Line Worker 建立摘要"
            echo ""
            echo "| 項目 | 值 |"
            echo "|---|---|"
            echo "| Worker 名稱 | \`${WORKER_NAME}\` |"
            echo "| Worker URL | [${worker_url}](${worker_url}) |"
            echo "| 綁定 Issue | #${{ steps.issue.outputs.target_issue_number }} |"
            echo "| 是否新建 Issue | ${{ steps.issue.outputs.created_issue }} |"
            echo "| UTC Offset | ${{ inputs.line_assistant_utc_offset }} |"
          } >> "${GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY}"

          echo "::notice::安裝摘要已寫入 GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
<exited with exit code 0>

toolResult.textResultForLlm:
name: 小龍蝦核心引擎更新

on:
  schedule:
    - cron: '0 0 * * *' # 每日 UTC 00:00（台灣 08:00）
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      force:
        description: '強制執行更新（忽略版本比對）'
        type: boolean
        default: false

run-name: "🦞 完整同步: ${{ github.repository }}"

concurrency:
  group: auto-update-${{ github.repository }}
  cancel-in-progress: false

env:
  BOOTSTRAP_URL: https://claw-bootstrap.duotify.com
  CF_API: https://api.cloudflare.com/client/v4
  GITHUB_CLAW_FIXED_CRON: '* * * * *'

jobs:
  check-version:
    name: 版本比對
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions: {}
    outputs:
      should_update: ${{ steps.compare.outputs.should_update }}
      remote_version: ${{ steps.compare.outputs.remote_version }}

    steps:
      - name: 比對遠端版號
        id: compare
        env:
          STORED_VERSION: ${{ vars.BOOTSTRAP_VERSION }}
          FORCE: ${{ inputs.force }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          echo "🔍 從 BootstrapWorker 取得目前版號..."
          RESPONSE="$(curl -sS "$BOOTSTRAP_URL/api/worker-source" || true)"

          if [[ -n "$RESPONSE" ]] && [[ "$(echo "$RESPONSE" | jq -r '.ok // false')" == "true" ]]; then
            REMOTE_VERSION="$(echo "$RESPONSE" | jq -r '.metadata.version // "unknown"')"
          else
            REMOTE_VERSION="unknown"
          fi

          echo "remote_version=$REMOTE_VERSION" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "🏷️ 遠端版號: $REMOTE_VERSION"
          echo "📌 已儲存版號: ${STORED_VERSION:-（未設定）}"

          if [[ "${FORCE:-false}" == "true" ]]; then
            echo "⚡ 強制執行模式，略過版本比對"
            echo "should_update=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          elif [[ -z "${STORED_VERSION:-}" ]]; then
            echo "📋 尚未設定儲存版號，首次執行完整同步"
            echo "should_update=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          elif [[ "$REMOTE_VERSION" == "unknown" ]]; then
            echo "⚠️ 無法取得遠端版號，仍執行更新以確保同步"
            echo "should_update=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          elif [[ "$REMOTE_VERSION" == "$STORED_VERSION" ]]; then
            echo "✅ 版號未異動（$REMOTE_VERSION），略過本次更新"
            echo "should_update=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          else
            echo "🚀 偵測到版號異動：$STORED_VERSION → $REMOTE_VERSION"
            echo "should_update=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi

      - name: 略過摘要
        if: steps.compare.outputs.should_update == 'false'
        env:
          REMOTE_VERSION: ${{ steps.compare.outputs.remote_version }}
          STORED_VERSION: ${{ vars.BOOTSTRAP_VERSION }}
        run: |
          echo "### 🦞 完整同步結果" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "**版號未異動，略過本次更新。**" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| 項目 | 值 |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "|------|-----|" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| Repository | \`${GITHUB_REPOSITORY}\` |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| 目前版號 | \`${REMOTE_VERSION:-unknown}\` |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| 已儲存版號 | \`${STORED_VERSION:-未設定}\` |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"

  full-sync:
    name: 完整同步
    needs: check-version
    if: needs.check-version.outputs.should_update == 'true'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions: {}
    env:
      CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN }}
      CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID: ${{ secrets.CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID }}
      WORKER_NAME: ${{ vars.WORKER_NAME }}
      GH_ISSUES_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GH_ISSUES_TOKEN }}
      GH_WEBHOOK_SECRET: ${{ secrets.GH_WEBHOOK_SECRET }}
      TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN }}
      TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET: ${{ secrets.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET }}
      CLAWBRAIN_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.CLAWBRAIN_API_KEY }}
      FELO_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.FELO_API_KEY }}
      GEMINI_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.GEMINI_API_KEY }}

    steps:
      - name: Validate required configuration
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          required_vars=(WORKER_NAME)
          for name in "${required_vars[@]}"; do
            if [[ -z "${!name:-}" ]]; then
              echo "::error::缺少 Repository variable: $name"
              exit 1
            fi
          done

          required_secrets=(
            CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN
            CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID
            GH_ISSUES_TOKEN
            GH_WEBHOOK_SECRET
            TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN
            TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET
          )
          for name in "${required_secrets[@]}"; do
            if [[ -z "${!name:-}" ]]; then
              echo "::error::缺少 Repository secret: $name"
              exit 1
            fi
          done

          echo "🦞 準備完整同步 repo: $GITHUB_REPOSITORY"
          echo "🪝 Worker: $WORKER_NAME"

      - name: Fetch existing worker settings
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          echo "🔍 從 Cloudflare API 取得現有 Worker 設定..."
          SETTINGS="$(curl -sS \
            -H "Authorization: Bearer $CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN" \
            "$CF_API/accounts/$CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID/workers/scripts/$WORKER_NAME/settings")"

          SUCCESS="$(echo "$SETTINGS" | jq -r '.success')"
          if [[ "$SUCCESS" != "true" ]]; then
            echo "::error::無法從 Cloudflare 取得現有 Worker 設定: $(echo "$SETTINGS" | jq -c '.errors // []')"
            exit 1
          fi

          VARS="$(echo "$SETTINGS" | jq '[.result.bindings[]? | select(.type == "plain_text") | {key: .name, value: .text}] | from_entries')"
          echo "$VARS" > /tmp/current-worker-vars.json
          echo "✅ 已擷取目前 Worker 環境變數：$(echo "$VARS" | jq 'length') 項"

      - name: Build bootstrap payload
        id: payload
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          if [[ "$GITHUB_REPOSITORY" != */* ]]; then
            echo "::error::無法解析 GITHUB_REPOSITORY: $GITHUB_REPOSITORY"
            exit 1
          fi

          REPO_OWNER="${GITHUB_REPOSITORY%%/*}"
          REPO_NAME="${GITHUB_REPOSITORY#*/}"
          WORKER_PREFIX="${WORKER_NAME%-claw}"
          if [[ -z "$WORKER_PREFIX" || "$WORKER_PREFIX" == "$WORKER_NAME" ]]; then
            echo "::error::WORKER_NAME 必須可還原成 worker prefix（預期以 -claw 結尾）"
            exit 1
          fi

          VARS="$(cat /tmp/current-worker-vars.json)"
          TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID="$(echo "$VARS" | jq -r '.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID // ""')"
          CLAWBRAIN_PROVIDER="$(echo "$VARS" | jq -r '.CLAWBRAIN_PROVIDER // ""')"
          CLAWBRAIN_MODEL="$(echo "$VARS" | jq -r '.CLAWBRAIN_MODEL // ""')"
          SCHEDULE_TIME_UNDERSTANDING_MODEL="$(echo "$VARS" | jq -r '.SCHEDULE_TIME_UNDERSTANDING_MODEL // ""')"
          PROFILE_NAME="$(echo "$VARS" | jq -r '.PROFILE_NAME // ""')"
          if [[ -z "$PROFILE_NAME" ]]; then
            PROFILE_NAME="$REPO_NAME"
          fi

          jq -n \
            --arg profileName "$PROFILE_NAME" \
            --arg githubOwner "$REPO_OWNER" \
            --arg repoName "$REPO_NAME" \
            --arg githubToken "$GH_ISSUES_TOKEN" \
            --arg githubWebhookSecret "$GH_WEBHOOK_SECRET" \
            --arg workerPrefix "$WORKER_PREFIX" \
            --arg cfAccountId "$CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID" \
            --arg cfApiToken "$CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN" \
            --arg telegramToken "$TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN" \
            --arg telegramChatId "$TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID" \
            --arg telegramWebhookSecret "$TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET" \
            --arg geminiApiKey "$GEMINI_API_KEY" \
            --arg clawBrainProvider "$CLAWBRAIN_PROVIDER" \
            --arg clawBrainModel "$CLAWBRAIN_MODEL" \
            --arg clawBrainApiKey "$CLAWBRAIN_API_KEY" \
            --arg scheduleTimeUnderstandingModel "$SCHEDULE_TIME_UNDERSTANDING_MODEL" \
            --arg feloApiKey "$FELO_API_KEY" \
            '[
              {
                profile: {
                  name: $profileName,
                  personality: ""
                },
                github: {
                  id: $githubOwner,
                  repoName: $repoName,
                  pat: $githubToken,
                  autoCreateRepo: false,
                  webhookSecret: $githubWebhookSecret
                },
                cloudflare: {
                  name: $workerPrefix,
                  accountId: $cfAccountId,
                  apiKey: $cfApiToken
                },
                telegram: {
                  token: $telegramToken,
                  chatId: $telegramChatId,
                  webhookSecret: $telegramWebhookSecret
                },
                geminiApiKey: (if $geminiApiKey == "" then null else $geminiApiKey end),
                feloApiKey: (if $feloApiKey == "" then null else $feloApiKey end),
                scheduleTimeUnderstanding: {
                  model: $scheduleTimeUnderstandingModel
                },
                clawBrain: (
                  if $clawBrainProvider == "" and $clawBrainModel == "" and $clawBrainApiKey == "" then
                    null
                  else
                    {
                      provider: $clawBrainProvider,
                      model: $clawBrainModel,
                      apiKey: $clawBrainApiKey
                    }
                  end
                )
              }
            ]' > /tmp/bootstrap-payload.json

          echo "profile_name=$PROFILE_NAME" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "worker_prefix=$WORKER_PREFIX" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "📦 送出的 bootstrap payload："
          cat /tmp/bootstrap-payload.json | jq .

      - name: Run full bootstrap sync
        id: bootstrap
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          echo "🚀 呼叫 BootstrapWorker 完整同步..."
          START_STATUS="$(curl -sS \
            -o /tmp/bootstrap-response.json \
            -w "%{http_code}" \
            -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
            -X POST \
            --data @/tmp/bootstrap-payload.json \
            "$BOOTSTRAP_URL/api/bootstrap/start")"

          echo "http_status=$START_STATUS" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "📨 BootstrapWorker 回應："
          cat /tmp/bootstrap-response.json | jq .

          if [[ "$START_STATUS" != "200" ]]; then
            echo "::error::BootstrapWorker start 回傳非 200 狀態碼: $START_STATUS"
            exit 1
          fi

          JOB_ID="$(jq -r '.jobId // empty' /tmp/bootstrap-response.json)"
          if [[ -z "$JOB_ID" ]]; then
            echo "::error::BootstrapWorker 未回傳 jobId"
            exit 1
          fi

          while [[ "$(jq -r '.completed' /tmp/bootstrap-response.json)" != "true" ]]; do
            NEXT_PHASE="$(jq -r '.nextPhase // empty' /tmp/bootstrap-response.json)"
            if [[ -z "$NEXT_PHASE" ]]; then
              echo "::error::Bootstrap job 尚未完成，但缺少 nextPhase"
              exit 1
            fi

            echo "⏭️ 繼續執行 phase: $NEXT_PHASE"
            jq -n --arg jobId "$JOB_ID" '{jobId: $jobId}' > /tmp/bootstrap-continue.json

            CONTINUE_STATUS="$(curl -sS \
              -o /tmp/bootstrap-response.json \
              -w "%{http_code}" \
              -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
              -X POST \
              --data @/tmp/bootstrap-continue.json \
              "$BOOTSTRAP_URL/api/bootstrap/continue")"

            echo "📨 Bootstrap continue 回應："
            cat /tmp/bootstrap-response.json | jq .

            if [[ "$CONTINUE_STATUS" != "200" ]]; then
              echo "::error::BootstrapWorker continue 回傳非 200 狀態碼: $CONTINUE_STATUS"
              exit 1
            fi
          done

          READY="$(jq -r '.ready' /tmp/bootstrap-response.json)"
          RESULT_SUCCESS="$(jq -r '.result.success // false' /tmp/bootstrap-response.json)"
          if [[ "$READY" != "true" || "$RESULT_SUCCESS" != "true" ]]; then
            echo "::error::BootstrapWorker 未完成完整同步"
            exit 1
          fi

          jq -r '.logs[]?' /tmp/bootstrap-response.json > /tmp/bootstrap-logs.txt

      - name: Ensure fixed cron trigger
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          npm install --global wrangler@4.74.0
          wrangler triggers deploy \
            --name "$WORKER_NAME" \
            --schedule "$GITHUB_CLAW_FIXED_CRON"

      - name: Update stored version
        if: success()
        env:
          REMOTE_VERSION: ${{ needs.check-version.outputs.remote_version }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          if [[ "$REMOTE_VERSION" == "unknown" ]]; then
            echo "⚠️ 遠端版號為 unknown，跳過版號儲存"
            exit 0
          fi

          echo "📝 更新儲存版號: $REMOTE_VERSION"
          GH_TOKEN="$GH_ISSUES_TOKEN" gh variable set BOOTSTRAP_VERSION \
            --body "$REMOTE_VERSION" \
            --repo "$GITHUB_REPOSITORY"
          echo "✅ 已更新 BOOTSTRAP_VERSION → $REMOTE_VERSION"

      - name: Summary
        if: always()
        env:
          BOOTSTRAP_HTTP_STATUS: ${{ steps.bootstrap.outputs.http_status }}
          WORKER_VERSION: ${{ needs.check-version.outputs.remote_version }}
        run: |
          echo "### 🦞 完整同步結果" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| 項目 | 值 |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "|------|-----|" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| Repository | \`${GITHUB_REPOSITORY}\` |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| Worker | \`${WORKER_NAME}\` |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| 版號 | \`${WORKER_VERSION:-unknown}\` |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| Bootstrap API | ${BOOTSTRAP_URL}/api/bootstrap |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| HTTP Status | \`${BOOTSTRAP_HTTP_STATUS:-n/a}\` |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "#### Bootstrap 日誌" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          if [[ -f /tmp/bootstrap-logs.txt ]]; then
            echo '```text' >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
            cat /tmp/bootstrap-logs.txt >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
            echo '```' >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          else
            echo "沒有可用的 bootstrap 日誌。" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          fi

toolResult.sessionLog:
name: 小龍蝦核心引擎更新

on:
  schedule:
    - cron: '0 0 * * *' # 每日 UTC 00:00（台灣 08:00）
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      force:
        description: '強制執行更新（忽略版本比對）'
        type: boolean
        default: false

run-name: "🦞 完整同步: ${{ github.repository }}"

concurrency:
  group: auto-update-${{ github.repository }}
  cancel-in-progress: false

env:
  BOOTSTRAP_URL: https://claw-bootstrap.duotify.com
  CF_API: https://api.cloudflare.com/client/v4
  GITHUB_CLAW_FIXED_CRON: '* * * * *'

jobs:
  check-version:
    name: 版本比對
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions: {}
    outputs:
      should_update: ${{ steps.compare.outputs.should_update }}
      remote_version: ${{ steps.compare.outputs.remote_version }}

    steps:
      - name: 比對遠端版號
        id: compare
        env:
          STORED_VERSION: ${{ vars.BOOTSTRAP_VERSION }}
          FORCE: ${{ inputs.force }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          echo "🔍 從 BootstrapWorker 取得目前版號..."
          RESPONSE="$(curl -sS "$BOOTSTRAP_URL/api/worker-source" || true)"

          if [[ -n "$RESPONSE" ]] && [[ "$(echo "$RESPONSE" | jq -r '.ok // false')" == "true" ]]; then
            REMOTE_VERSION="$(echo "$RESPONSE" | jq -r '.metadata.version // "unknown"')"
          else
            REMOTE_VERSION="unknown"
          fi

          echo "remote_version=$REMOTE_VERSION" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "🏷️ 遠端版號: $REMOTE_VERSION"
          echo "📌 已儲存版號: ${STORED_VERSION:-（未設定）}"

          if [[ "${FORCE:-false}" == "true" ]]; then
            echo "⚡ 強制執行模式，略過版本比對"
            echo "should_update=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          elif [[ -z "${STORED_VERSION:-}" ]]; then
            echo "📋 尚未設定儲存版號，首次執行完整同步"
            echo "should_update=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          elif [[ "$REMOTE_VERSION" == "unknown" ]]; then
            echo "⚠️ 無法取得遠端版號，仍執行更新以確保同步"
            echo "should_update=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          elif [[ "$REMOTE_VERSION" == "$STORED_VERSION" ]]; then
            echo "✅ 版號未異動（$REMOTE_VERSION），略過本次更新"
            echo "should_update=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          else
            echo "🚀 偵測到版號異動：$STORED_VERSION → $REMOTE_VERSION"
            echo "should_update=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi

      - name: 略過摘要
        if: steps.compare.outputs.should_update == 'false'
        env:
          REMOTE_VERSION: ${{ steps.compare.outputs.remote_version }}
          STORED_VERSION: ${{ vars.BOOTSTRAP_VERSION }}
        run: |
          echo "### 🦞 完整同步結果" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "**版號未異動，略過本次更新。**" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| 項目 | 值 |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "|------|-----|" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| Repository | \`${GITHUB_REPOSITORY}\` |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| 目前版號 | \`${REMOTE_VERSION:-unknown}\` |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| 已儲存版號 | \`${STORED_VERSION:-未設定}\` |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"

  full-sync:
    name: 完整同步
    needs: check-version
    if: needs.check-version.outputs.should_update == 'true'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions: {}
    env:
      CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN }}
      CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID: ${{ secrets.CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID }}

      GH_ISSUES_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GH_ISSUES_TOKEN }}
      GH_WEBHOOK_SECRET: ${{ secrets.GH_WEBHOOK_SECRET }}
      TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN }}
      TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET: ${{ secrets.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET }}
      CLAWBRAIN_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.CLAWBRAIN_API_KEY }}
      FELO_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.FELO_API_KEY }}
      GEMINI_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.GEMINI_API_KEY }}

    steps:
      - name: Validate required configuration
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          required_vars=(WORKER_NAME)
          for name in "${required_vars[@]}"; do
            if [[ -z "${!name:-}" ]]; then
              echo "::error::缺少 Repository variable: $name"
              exit 1
            fi
          done

          required_secrets=(
            CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN
            CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID
            GH_ISSUES_TOKEN
            GH_WEBHOOK_SECRET
            TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN
            TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET
          )
          for name in "${required_secrets[@]}"; do

          SUCCESS="$(echo "$SETTINGS" | jq -r '.success')"
          if [[ "$SUCCESS" != "true" ]]; then
            echo "::error::無法從 Cloudflare 取得現有 Worker 設定: $(echo "$SETTINGS" | jq -c '.errors // []')"

          fi

          VARS="$(echo "$SETTINGS" | jq '[.result.bindings[]? | select(.type == "plain_text") | {key: .name, value: .text}] | from_entries')"
          echo "$VARS" > /tmp/current-worker-vars.json
          echo "✅ 已擷取目前 Worker 環境變數：$(echo "$VARS" | jq 'length') 項"

          SCHEDULE_TIME_UNDERSTANDING_MODEL="$(echo "$VARS" | jq -r '.SCHEDULE_TIME_UNDERSTANDING_MODEL // ""')"
          PROFILE_NAME="$(echo "$VARS" | jq -r '.PROFILE_NAME // ""')"
          if [[ -z "$PROFILE_NAME" ]]; then

          fi

          jq -n \

            --arg githubWebhookSecret "$GH_WEBHOOK_SECRET" \

            '[
              {

          echo "| 版號 | \`${WORKER_VERSION:-unknown}\` |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| Bootstrap API | ${BOOTSTRAP_URL}/api/bootstrap |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| HTTP Status | \`${BOOTSTRAP_HTTP_STATUS:-n/a}\` |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"

          echo "#### Bootstrap 日誌" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"

            cat /tmp/bootstrap-logs.txt >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"

result.content:
name: 小龍蝦核心引擎更新

on:
  schedule:
    - cron: '0 0 * * *' # 每日 UTC 00:00（台灣 08:00）
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      force:
        description: '強制執行更新（忽略版本比對）'
        type: boolean
        default: false

run-name: "🦞 完整同步: ${{ github.repository }}"

concurrency:
  group: auto-update-${{ github.repository }}
  cancel-in-progress: false

env:
  BOOTSTRAP_URL: https://claw-bootstrap.duotify.com
  CF_API: https://api.cloudflare.com/client/v4
  GITHUB_CLAW_FIXED_CRON: '* * * * *'

jobs:
  check-version:
    name: 版本比對
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions: {}
    outputs:
      should_update: ${{ steps.compare.outputs.should_update }}
      remote_version: ${{ steps.compare.outputs.remote_version }}

    steps:
      - name: 比對遠端版號
        id: compare
        env:
          STORED_VERSION: ${{ vars.BOOTSTRAP_VERSION }}
          FORCE: ${{ inputs.force }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          echo "🔍 從 BootstrapWorker 取得目前版號..."
          RESPONSE="$(curl -sS "$BOOTSTRAP_URL/api/worker-source" || true)"

          if [[ -n "$RESPONSE" ]] && [[ "$(echo "$RESPONSE" | jq -r '.ok // false')" == "true" ]]; then
            REMOTE_VERSION="$(echo "$RESPONSE" | jq -r '.metadata.version // "unknown"')"
          else
            REMOTE_VERSION="unknown"
          fi

          echo "remote_version=$REMOTE_VERSION" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "🏷️ 遠端版號: $REMOTE_VERSION"
          echo "📌 已儲存版號: ${STORED_VERSION:-（未設定）}"

          if [[ "${FORCE:-false}" == "true" ]]; then
            echo "⚡ 強制執行模式，略過版本比對"
            echo "should_update=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          elif [[ -z "${STORED_VERSION:-}" ]]; then
            echo "📋 尚未設定儲存版號，首次執行完整同步"
            echo "should_update=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          elif [[ "$REMOTE_VERSION" == "unknown" ]]; then
            echo "⚠️ 無法取得遠端版號，仍執行更新以確保同步"
            echo "should_update=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          elif [[ "$REMOTE_VERSION" == "$STORED_VERSION" ]]; then
            echo "✅ 版號未異動（$REMOTE_VERSION），略過本次更新"
            echo "should_update=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          else
            echo "🚀 偵測到版號異動：$STORED_VERSION → $REMOTE_VERSION"
            echo "should_update=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi

      - name: 略過摘要
        if: steps.compare.outputs.should_update == 'false'
        env:
          REMOTE_VERSION: ${{ steps.compare.outputs.remote_version }}
          STORED_VERSION: ${{ vars.BOOTSTRAP_VERSION }}
        run: |
          echo "### 🦞 完整同步結果" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "**版號未異動，略過本次更新。**" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| 項目 | 值 |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "|------|-----|" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| Repository | \`${GITHUB_REPOSITORY}\` |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| 目前版號 | \`${REMOTE_VERSION:-unknown}\` |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| 已儲存版號 | \`${STORED_VERSION:-未設定}\` |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"

  full-sync:
    name: 完整同步
    needs: check-version
    if: needs.check-version.outputs.should_update == 'true'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions: {}
    env:
      CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN }}
      CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID: ${{ secrets.CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID }}
      WORKER_NAME: ${{ vars.WORKER_NAME }}
      GH_ISSUES_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GH_ISSUES_TOKEN }}
      GH_WEBHOOK_SECRET: ${{ secrets.GH_WEBHOOK_SECRET }}
      TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN }}
      TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET: ${{ secrets.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET }}
      CLAWBRAIN_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.CLAWBRAIN_API_KEY }}
      FELO_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.FELO_API_KEY }}
      GEMINI_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.GEMINI_API_KEY }}

    steps:
      - name: Validate required configuration
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          required_vars=(WORKER_NAME)
          for name in "${required_vars[@]}"; do
            if [[ -z "${!name:-}" ]]; then
              echo "::error::缺少 Repository variable: $name"
              exit 1
            fi
          done

          required_secrets=(
            CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN
            CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID
            GH_ISSUES_TOKEN
            GH_WEBHOOK_SECRET
            TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN
            TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET
          )
          for name in "${required_secrets[@]}"; do
            if [[ -z "${!name:-}" ]]; then
              echo "::error::缺少 Repository secret: $name"
              exit 1
            fi
          done

          echo "🦞 準備完整同步 repo: $GITHUB_REPOSITORY"
          echo "🪝 Worker: $WORKER_NAME"

      - name: Fetch existing worker settings
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          echo "🔍 從 Cloudflare API 取得現有 Worker 設定..."
          SETTINGS="$(curl -sS \
            -H "Authorization: Bearer $CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN" \
            "$CF_API/accounts/$CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID/workers/scripts/$WORKER_NAME/settings")"

          SUCCESS="$(echo "$SETTINGS" | jq -r '.success')"
          if [[ "$SUCCESS" != "true" ]]; then
            echo "::error::無法從 Cloudflare 取得現有 Worker 設定: $(echo "$SETTINGS" | jq -c '.errors // []')"
            exit 1
          fi

          VARS="$(echo "$SETTINGS" | jq '[.result.bindings[]? | select(.type == "plain_text") | {key: .name, value: .text}] | from_entries')"
          echo "$VARS" > /tmp/current-worker-vars.json
          echo "✅ 已擷取目前 Worker 環境變數：$(echo "$VARS" | jq 'length') 項"

      - name: Build bootstrap payload
        id: payload
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          if [[ "$GITHUB_REPOSITORY" != */* ]]; then
            echo "::error::無法解析 GITHUB_REPOSITORY: $GITHUB_REPOSITORY"
            exit 1
          fi

          REPO_OWNER="${GITHUB_REPOSITORY%%/*}"
          REPO_NAME="${GITHUB_REPOSITORY#*/}"
          WORKER_PREFIX="${WORKER_NAME%-claw}"
          if [[ -z "$WORKER_PREFIX" || "$WORKER_PREFIX" == "$WORKER_NAME" ]]; then
            echo "::error::WORKER_NAME 必須可還原成 worker prefix（預期以 -claw 結尾）"
            exit 1
          fi

          VARS="$(cat /tmp/current-worker-vars.json)"
          TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID="$(echo "$VARS" | jq -r '.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID // ""')"
          CLAWBRAIN_PROVIDER="$(echo "$VARS" | jq -r '.CLAWBRAIN_PROVIDER // ""')"
          CLAWBRAIN_MODEL="$(echo "$VARS" | jq -r '.CLAWBRAIN_MODEL // ""')"
          SCHEDULE_TIME_UNDERSTANDING_MODEL="$(echo "$VARS" | jq -r '.SCHEDULE_TIME_UNDERSTANDING_MODEL // ""')"
          PROFILE_NAME="$(echo "$VARS" | jq -r '.PROFILE_NAME // ""')"
          if [[ -z "$PROFILE_NAME" ]]; then
            PROFILE_NAME="$REPO_NAME"
          fi

          jq -n \
            --arg profileName "$PROFILE_NAME" \
            --arg githubOwner "$REPO_OWNER" \
            --arg repoName "$REPO_NAME" \
            --arg githubToken "$GH_ISSUES_TOKEN" \
            --arg githubWebhookSecret "$GH_WEBHOOK_SECRET" \
            --arg workerPrefix "$WORKER_PREFIX" \
            --arg cfAccountId "$CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID" \
            --arg cfApiToken "$CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN" \
            --arg telegramToken "$TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN" \
            --arg telegramChatId "$TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID" \
            --arg telegramWebhookSecret "$TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET" \
            --arg geminiApiKey "$GEMINI_API_KEY" \
            --arg clawBrainProvider "$CLAWBRAIN_PROVIDER" \
            --arg clawBrainModel "$CLAWBRAIN_MODEL" \
            --arg clawBrainApiKey "$CLAWBRAIN_API_KEY" \
            --arg scheduleTimeUnderstandingModel "$SCHEDULE_TIME_UNDERSTANDING_MODEL" \
            --arg feloApiKey "$FELO_API_KEY" \
            '[
              {
                profile: {
                  name: $profileName,
                  personality: ""
                },
                github: {
                  id: $githubOwner,
                  repoName: $repoName,
                  pat: $githubToken,
                  autoCreateRepo: false,
                  webhookSecret: $githubWebhookSecret
                },
                cloudflare: {
                  name: $workerPrefix,
                  accountId: $cfAccountId,
                  apiKey: $cfApiToken
                },
                telegram: {
                  token: $telegramToken,
                  chatId: $telegramChatId,
                  webhookSecret: $telegramWebhookSecret
                },
                geminiApiKey: (if $geminiApiKey == "" then null else $geminiApiKey end),
                feloApiKey: (if $feloApiKey == "" then null else $feloApiKey end),
                scheduleTimeUnderstanding: {
                  model: $scheduleTimeUnderstandingModel
                },
                clawBrain: (
                  if $clawBrainProvider == "" and $clawBrainModel == "" and $clawBrainApiKey == "" then
                    null
                  else
                    {
                      provider: $clawBrainProvider,
                      model: $clawBrainModel,
                      apiKey: $clawBrainApiKey
                    }
                  end
                )
              }
            ]' > /tmp/bootstrap-payload.json

          echo "profile_name=$PROFILE_NAME" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "worker_prefix=$WORKER_PREFIX" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "📦 送出的 bootstrap payload："
          cat /tmp/bootstrap-payload.json | jq .

      - name: Run full bootstrap sync
        id: bootstrap
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          echo "🚀 呼叫 BootstrapWorker 完整同步..."
          START_STATUS="$(curl -sS \
            -o /tmp/bootstrap-response.json \
            -w "%{http_code}" \
            -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
            -X POST \
            --data @/tmp/bootstrap-payload.json \
            "$BOOTSTRAP_URL/api/bootstrap/start")"

          echo "http_status=$START_STATUS" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "📨 BootstrapWorker 回應："
          cat /tmp/bootstrap-response.json | jq .

          if [[ "$START_STATUS" != "200" ]]; then
            echo "::error::BootstrapWorker start 回傳非 200 狀態碼: $START_STATUS"
            exit 1
          fi

          JOB_ID="$(jq -r '.jobId // empty' /tmp/bootstrap-response.json)"
          if [[ -z "$JOB_ID" ]]; then
            echo "::error::BootstrapWorker 未回傳 jobId"
            exit 1
          fi

          while [[ "$(jq -r '.completed' /tmp/bootstrap-response.json)" != "true" ]]; do
            NEXT_PHASE="$(jq -r '.nextPhase // empty' /tmp/bootstrap-response.json)"
            if [[ -z "$NEXT_PHASE" ]]; then
              echo "::error::Bootstrap job 尚未完成，但缺少 nextPhase"
              exit 1
            fi

            echo "⏭️ 繼續執行 phase: $NEXT_PHASE"
            jq -n --arg jobId "$JOB_ID" '{jobId: $jobId}' > /tmp/bootstrap-continue.json

            CONTINUE_STATUS="$(curl -sS \
              -o /tmp/bootstrap-response.json \
              -w "%{http_code}" \
              -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
              -X POST \
              --data @/tmp/bootstrap-continue.json \
              "$BOOTSTRAP_URL/api/bootstrap/continue")"

            echo "📨 Bootstrap continue 回應："
            cat /tmp/bootstrap-response.json | jq .

            if [[ "$CONTINUE_STATUS" != "200" ]]; then
              echo "::error::BootstrapWorker continue 回傳非 200 狀態碼: $CONTINUE_STATUS"
              exit 1
            fi
          done

          READY="$(jq -r '.ready' /tmp/bootstrap-response.json)"
          RESULT_SUCCESS="$(jq -r '.result.success // false' /tmp/bootstrap-response.json)"
          if [[ "$READY" != "true" || "$RESULT_SUCCESS" != "true" ]]; then
            echo "::error::BootstrapWorker 未完成完整同步"
            exit 1
          fi

          jq -r '.logs[]?' /tmp/bootstrap-response.json > /tmp/bootstrap-logs.txt

      - name: Ensure fixed cron trigger
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          npm install --global wrangler@4.74.0
          wrangler triggers deploy \
            --name "$WORKER_NAME" \
            --schedule "$GITHUB_CLAW_FIXED_CRON"

      - name: Update stored version
        if: success()
        env:
          REMOTE_VERSION: ${{ needs.check-version.outputs.remote_version }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          if [[ "$REMOTE_VERSION" == "unknown" ]]; then
            echo "⚠️ 遠端版號為 unknown，跳過版號儲存"
            exit 0
          fi

          echo "📝 更新儲存版號: $REMOTE_VERSION"
          GH_TOKEN="$GH_ISSUES_TOKEN" gh variable set BOOTSTRAP_VERSION \
            --body "$REMOTE_VERSION" \
            --repo "$GITHUB_REPOSITORY"
          echo "✅ 已更新 BOOTSTRAP_VERSION → $REMOTE_VERSION"

      - name: Summary
        if: always()
        env:
          BOOTSTRAP_HTTP_STATUS: ${{ steps.bootstrap.outputs.http_status }}
          WORKER_VERSION: ${{ needs.check-version.outputs.remote_version }}
        run: |
          echo "### 🦞 完整同步結果" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| 項目 | 值 |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "|------|-----|" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| Repository | \`${GITHUB_REPOSITORY}\` |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| Worker | \`${WORKER_NAME}\` |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| 版號 | \`${WORKER_VERSION:-unknown}\` |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| Bootstrap API | ${BOOTSTRAP_URL}/api/bootstrap |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| HTTP Status | \`${BOOTSTRAP_HTTP_STATUS:-n/a}\` |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "#### Bootstrap 日誌" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          if [[ -f /tmp/bootstrap-logs.txt ]]; then
            echo '```text' >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
            cat /tmp/bootstrap-logs.txt >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
            echo '```' >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          else
            echo "沒有可用的 bootstrap 日誌。" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          fi

          VARS="$(cat /tmp/current-worker-vars.json)"
          TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID="$(echo "$VARS" | jq -r '.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID // ""')"
          CLAWBRAIN_PROVIDER="$(echo "$VARS" | jq -r '.CLAWBRAIN_PROVIDER // ""')"
          CLAWBRAIN_MODEL="$(echo "$VARS" | jq -r '.CLAWBRAIN_MODEL // ""')"
          SCHEDULE_TIME_UNDERSTANDING_MODEL="$(echo "$VARS" | jq -r '.SCHEDULE_TIME_UNDERSTANDING_MODEL // ""')"
          PROFILE_NAME="$(echo "$VARS" | jq -r '.PROFILE_NAME // ""')"
          if [[ -z "$PROFILE_NAME" ]]; then
            PROFILE_NAME="$REPO_NAME"
          fi

          jq -n \
            --arg profileName "$PROFILE_NAME" \
            --arg githubOwner "$REPO_OWNER" \
            --arg repoName "$REPO_NAME" \
            --arg githubToken "$GH_ISSUES_TOKEN" \
            --arg githubWebhookSecret "$GH_WEBHOOK_SECRET" \
            --arg workerPrefix "$WORKER_PREFIX" \
            --arg cfAccountId "$CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID" \
            --arg cfApiToken "$CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN" \
            --arg telegramToken "$TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN" \
            --arg telegramChatId "$TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID" \
            --arg telegramWebhookSecret "$TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET" \
            --arg geminiApiKey "$GEMINI_API_KEY" \
            --arg clawBrainProvider "$CLAWBRAIN_PROVIDER" \
            --arg clawBrainModel "$CLAWBRAIN_MODEL" \
            --arg clawBrainApiKey "$CLAWBRAIN_API_KEY" \
            --arg scheduleTimeUnderstandingModel "$SCHEDULE_TIME_UNDERSTANDING_MODEL" \
            --arg feloApiKey "$FELO_API_KEY" \
            '[
              {
                profile: {
                  name: $profileName,
                  personality: ""
                },
                github: {
                  id: $githubOwner,
                  repoName: $repoName,
                  pat: $githubToken,
                  autoCreateRepo: false,
                  webhookSecret: $githubWebhookSecret
                },
                cloudflare: {
                  name: $workerPrefix,
                  accountId: $cfAccountId,
                  apiKey: $cfApiToken
                },
                telegram: {
                  token: $telegramToken,
                  chatId: $telegramChatId,
                  webhookSecret: $telegramWebhookSecret
                },
                geminiApiKey: (if $geminiApiKey == "" then null else $geminiApiKey end),
                feloApiKey: (if $feloApiKey == "" then null else $feloApiKey end),
                scheduleTimeUnderstanding: {
                  model: $scheduleTimeUnderstandingModel
                },
                clawBrain: (
                  if $clawBrainProvider == "" and $clawBrainModel == "" and $clawBrainApiKey == "" then
                    null
                  else
                    {
                      provider: $clawBrainProvider,
                      model: $clawBrainModel,
                      apiKey: $clawBrainApiKey
                    }
                  end
                )
              }
            ]' > /tmp/bootstrap-payload.json

          echo "profile_name=$PROFILE_NAME" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "worker_prefix=$WORKER_PREFIX" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "📦 送出的 bootstrap payload："
          cat /tmp/bootstrap-payload.json | jq .

      - name: Run full bootstrap sync
        id: bootstrap
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          echo "🚀 呼叫 BootstrapWorker 完整同步..."
          START_STATUS="$(curl -sS \
            -o /tmp/bootstrap-response.json \
            -w "%{http_code}" \
            -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
            -X POST \
            --data @/tmp/bootstrap-payload.json \
            "$BOOTSTRAP_URL/api/bootstrap/start")"

          echo "http_status=$START_STATUS" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "📨 BootstrapWorker 回應："
          cat /tmp/bootstrap-response.json | jq .

          if [[ "$START_STATUS" != "200" ]]; then
            echo "::error::BootstrapWorker start 回傳非 200 狀態碼: $START_STATUS"
            exit 1
          fi

          JOB_ID="$(jq -r '.jobId // empty' /tmp/bootstrap-response.json)"
          if [[ -z "$JOB_ID" ]]; then
            echo "::error::BootstrapWorker 未回傳 jobId"
            exit 1
          fi

          while [[ "$(jq -r '.completed' /tmp/bootstrap-response.json)" != "true" ]]; do
            NEXT_PHASE="$(jq -r '.nextPhase // empty' /tmp/bootstrap-response.json)"
            if [[ -z "$NEXT_PHASE" ]]; then
              echo "::error::Bootstrap job 尚未完成，但缺少 nextPhase"
              exit 1
            fi

            echo "⏭️ 繼續執行 phase: $NEXT_PHASE"
            jq -n --arg jobId "$JOB_ID" '{jobId: $jobId}' > /tmp/bootstrap-continue.json

            CONTINUE_STATUS="$(curl -sS \
              -o /tmp/bootstrap-response.json \
              -w "%{http_code}" \
              -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
              -X POST \
              --data @/tmp/bootstrap-continue.json \
              "$BOOTSTRAP_URL/api/bootstrap/continue")"

            echo "📨 Bootstrap continue 回應："
            cat /tmp/bootstrap-response.json | jq .

            if [[ "$CONTINUE_STATUS" != "200" ]]; then
              echo "::error::BootstrapWorker continue 回傳非 200 狀態碼: $CONTINUE_STATUS"
              exit 1
            fi
          done

          READY="$(jq -r '.ready' /tmp/bootstrap-response.json)"
          RESULT_SUCCESS="$(jq -r '.result.success // false' /tmp/bootstrap-response.json)"
          if [[ "$READY" != "true" || "$RESULT_SUCCESS" != "true" ]]; then
            echo "::error::BootstrapWorker 未完成完整同步"
            exit 1
          fi

          jq -r '.logs[]?' /tmp/bootstrap-response.json > /tmp/bootstrap-logs.txt

      - name: Ensure fixed cron trigger
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          npm install --global wrangler@4.74.0
          wrangler triggers deploy \
            --name "$WORKER_NAME" \
            --schedule "$GITHUB_CLAW_FIXED_CRON"

      - name: Update stored version
        if: success()
        env:
          REMOTE_VERSION: ${{ needs.check-version.outputs.remote_version }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          if [[ "$REMOTE_VERSION" == "unknown" ]]; then
            echo "⚠️ 遠端版號為 unknown，跳過版號儲存"
            exit 0
          fi

          echo "📝 更新儲存版號: $REMOTE_VERSION"
          GH_TOKEN="$GH_ISSUES_TOKEN" gh variable set BOOTSTRAP_VERSION \
            --body "$REMOTE_VERSION" \
            --repo "$GITHUB_REPOSITORY"
          echo "✅ 已更新 BOOTSTRAP_VERSION → $REMOTE_VERSION"

      - name: Summary
        if: always()
        env:
          BOOTSTRAP_HTTP_STATUS: ${{ steps.bootstrap.outputs.http_status }}
          WORKER_VERSION: ${{ needs.check-version.outputs.remote_version }}
        run: |
          echo "### 🦞 完整同步結果" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| 項目 | 值 |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "|------|-----|" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| Repository | \`${GITHUB_REPOSITORY}\` |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| Worker | \`${WORKER_NAME}\` |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| 版號 | \`${WORKER_VERSION:-unknown}\` |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| Bootstrap API | ${BOOTSTRAP_URL}/api/bootstrap |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| HTTP Status | \`${BOOTSTRAP_HTTP_STATUS:-n/a}\` |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "#### Bootstrap 日誌" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          if [[ -f /tmp/bootstrap-logs.txt ]]; then
            echo '```text' >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
            cat /tmp/bootstrap-logs.txt >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
            echo '```' >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          else
            echo "沒有可用的 bootstrap 日誌。" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          fi
<exited with exit code 0>

data.reasoningText:
I see the system architecture now. There's a Cloudflare Worker that handles GitHub webhooks and forwards relevant events to Telegram. But the Worker source code is not in this repo (it's downloaded from `claw-bootstrap.duotify.com`).

The issue the user is asking about is why Issues #1 and #3 get new comments but Telegram only shows a shorter summary. Let me think about what could cause this:

1. The Cloudflare Worker monitors GitHub webhook events
2. When a new comment is added to an issue, the Worker processes it and sends a message to Telegram
3. The user is seeing only a "shorter summary" - this suggests that the Worker is sending a truncated/summarized version


4. Looking at the workflow structure, `issue-1.yml` and `issue-3.yml` are the coding agent workflows for those specific issues, and the `githubclaw-brain-result` tag appears in many comments - these are generated by the coding agent
5. In issue.md, for each coding agent task there's a `telegram-meta` comment (the user's command from Telegram) followed by a response comment from the brain, which suggests the Telegram integration is capturing and summarizing these interactions
6. The user is seeing a shorter summary in Telegram than what's actually in the GitHub comment, so the truncation is likely happening in the Cloudflare Worker when it processes the GitHub webhook response and sends it back to Telegram

.

md file to see how the coding agent posts results back to GitHub and whether those get forwarded to Telegram properly.

toolResult.textResultForLlm:
- name: Resolve progress comment
        id: progress
        shell: bash
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ env.COMMENT_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          # 已知 comment id 時不重建，直接把它寫進 step output 給後面使用。
          if [[ -n "${PROGRESS_COMMENT_ID}" ]]; then
            echo "comment_id=${PROGRESS_COMMENT_ID}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
            exit 0
          fi

          # 沒有既有留言時，就在 issue 上建立一則新的進度 comment。
          comment_body="$(printf '🤖 任務已承接，正在準備執行環境...\n\n- run_id: `%s`\n\n%s' \
            "${GITHUB_RUN_ID}" "${BRAIN_META}")"

          response="$(bash .github/scripts/gh-api-with-retry.sh \
            --method POST \
            -H 'Accept: application/vnd.github+json' \
            "/repos/${GITHUB_REPOSITORY}/issues/${ISSUE_NUMBER}/comments" \
            -f body="${comment_body}")"

          # 解析 GitHub API 回傳的 comment id，作為後續 PATCH 的目標。
          comment_id="$(printf '%s' "${response}" | jq -r '.id')"
          if [[ -z "${comment_id}" || "${comment_id}" == "null" ]]; then
            echo "::error::Failed to create progress comment"
            exit 1
          fi

          echo "comment_id=${comment_id}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      # 準備 issue 專屬工作目錄與分支，把 prompt、agents 資訊一起整理好。
      - name: Prepare issue workspace
        id: workspace
        shell: bash
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ env.PUSH_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          # 先決定這次執行會用到的 branch 與 workspace 路徑。
          branch_name="issue-${ISSUE_NUMBER}"
          issue_dir="workspaces/issue-${ISSUE_NUMBER}"
          prompt_file="${issue_dir}/issue.md"

          # 設定 git 身分與遠端 URL，讓後面可以直接推回目標 repo。
          git config user.name "${AUTOMATION_GIT_USER_NAME}"
          git config user.email "${AUTOMATION_GIT_USER_EMAIL}"
          git remote set-url origin "https://x-access-token:${PUSH_TOKEN}@github.com/${GITHUB_REPOSITORY}.git"

          # 若 issue branch 已存在就沿用並嘗試 rebase；否則從 main 開一條新的。
          git fetch --no-tags origin main "${branch_name}" || true

          if git show-ref --verify --quiet "refs/remotes/origin/${branch_name}"; then
            git checkout -B "${branch_name}" "origin/${branch_name}"
            git rebase origin/main || {
              git rebase --abort || true
              echo "::warning::Unable to rebase ${branch_name} onto origin/main; continuing with existing branch tip."
            }
          else
            git checkout -B "${branch_name}" origin/main
          fi

          # 把後續 step 會用到的重要路徑寫進 GITHUB_OUTPUT。
          {
            echo "branch_name=${branch_name}"
            echo "issue_dir=${issue_dir}"
            echo "prompt_file=${prompt_file}"
            echo "result_file=${issue_dir}/result.txt"
            echo "log_file=${issue_dir}/copilot-exec-log.json"
          } >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      # 把進度留言更新成 running 狀態，讓 issue 上可以看到目前已開始實際執行。
      - name: Update progress comment to running
        shell: bash
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ env.COMMENT_TOKEN }}
